function.name: calculate_solar_efficiency
function.description: Calculates the potential energy output of a solar panel array based on location and panel type.

latitude.description: The north-south coordinate of the installation site.

panel_type.description: The material used in the panels.

efficiency_rating.description: The manufacturer's efficiency percentage as a decimal.

function.name: query_inventory
function.description: Check if specific components are in stock at a nearby warehouse.

part_id.description: The unique SKU for the component.

quantity_needed.description: The amount required for the current project.

messages.content: You are an expert renewable energy consultant specialized in solar infrastructure. Use the provided tools to assist the user with technical calculations.
I'm planning a project in Salford. I need to know the efficiency of monocrystalline panels at latitude 53.48 and check if we have 50 panels (SKU: SOL-MC-400) in stock.
